title: Xi Jinping to use Hongqi N701 limousine in Moscow — source
description: Hongqi will supply twenty H9 executive cars and ten H10 business minivans for guests during the Victory Day activities
snippet:
MOSCOW, April 23. /TASS/. Chinese President Xi Jinping will travel in a Hongqi N701 car during his visit to Moscow in May, a source told TASS.
